articles.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Iran targets American forces in Kuwait
articles.description: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.

articles.title: Satellite images suggest Iran's strikes are more precise and extensive than US acknowledged
articles.description: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.

articles.title: UK wins court case over collapsed Rwanda asylum deal
articles.description: The UK does not need to pay Rwanda after it pulled a deal between the two countries, a court has ruled.

articles.title: France seized sanctioned Russian oil tanker with UK help, Macron says
articles.description: A British helicopter provided support during the operation on Sunday, the UK ministry of defence says.
